name: phrasebook
description: Phrasebook — 地道短语 · 例句学习 (local full-stack learning app)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c green,cyan "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.dev:local: concurrently -n server,client -c green,cyan "npm run dev:local --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
